common.description: Check tourist scams, overcharging, and safety warnings on the map at a glance and share prevention tips.
common.welcome_desc: Use the filters above or click on red warning pins on the map to view local scam reports.
common.empty_warnings: No scam reports found for this region.

report_modal.title: Report Travel Scam / Risk
report_modal.desc: Submit a new warning card and location pinned at coordinates ({lat}, {lng}).
report_modal.place_name_placeholder: e.g., Opposite Khaosan Road Starbucks stall
report_modal.place_name_desc: This registers the name of the map pin and is shared with other reports.
report_modal.title_placeholder: e.g., Tuk-Tuk 10 Baht City Tour Scam
report_modal.desc_placeholder: Explain details of how you were scammed, amounts, or place descriptions. (min. 10 chars)
report_modal.avoidance_placeholder: Write down refusal tips or transport alternatives helpful for other travelers.
report_modal.attachments_label: Attach Evidence Photos (Receipts, signs, etc. - Max 5)
